falsification_attempt: Checked whether verifier negative-path classification disappeared. The destination still exposes BlockVerificationError, ErrorClass, error_class(), and is_system_error(), while refactoring some detailed old variants into grouped v2.2 verifier categories.
missed_risks: Focused tests should still cover representative system vs block-local classification values.
notes: The old error taxonomy is preserved behaviorally but not byte-for-byte.
